meaning: n.[解剖]犬齿adj.犬的,似犬的,犬科的,犬齿的
examples: Sloth bears also have relatively large canine teeth, which appear to be more functional for fighting than for foraging.
She even works with a canine chiropractor.
Canine guests are provided with their own designer bed and a doggie menu, for in-room dining.
He sported a braided leather headband and the curved tooth of a canine around his neck.
